/home/forbiddentypev/opt/cross/bin/x86_64-elf-g++ -ffreestanding -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -mno-red-zone -Wall -Wextra -O2 -nostdlib -static -T/home/forbiddentypev/Dev/OS/Amux/kernel/linker.ld "CMakeFiles/amux-kernel.dir/arch/x86_64/boot/multiboot.S.obj" "CMakeFiles/amux-kernel.dir/arch/x86_64/boot/entry.S.obj" "CMakeFiles/amux-kernel.dir/init/kmain.cpp.obj" -o amux-kernel
